SIX THINKERS: DIALOGUES
A writing-room course from The Kiwi Dialectic.

A writing-room course from The Kiwi Dialectic. Six figures — Antonio Gramsci, Peter Kropotkin, Mikhail Bakunin, Paulo Freire, Gilles Deleuze, David Graeber — take one round.

Beats:
00:03 — Gramsci
00:25 — Kropotkin
00:47 — Bakunin
01:01 — Freire
01:13 — Deleuze
01:33 — Graeber

Full course + module notes: https://kiwidialectic.substack.com
Source + assets: <publish repo to fill in>
